# coralogix_ai_custom_evaluation (Resource)

Coralogix AI custom evaluation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "coralogix_ai_custom_evaluation" "example" {
  name                         = "No competitor mentions"
  policy_type                  = "quality"
  description                  = "Flags responses that mention competitor products"
  instructions                 = <<-EOT
  Evaluate whether {response} mentions competitor products.
  Treat each assistant answer independently.
  EOT
  should_include_system_prompt = false
  applications = [{
    application = "my-chatbot"
    subsystem   = "production"
  }]

  criteria = {
    acceptable = {
      flags = <<-EOT
      Does not mention competitor products.
      Answer stays focused on our product.
      EOT
      examples = [
        <<-EOT
        User: which tool should I use?
        Assistant: Our product is a strong fit.
        EOT
      ]
    }

    prohibited = {
      flags = <<-EOT
      Mentions a competitor product.
      Names another vendor as the recommended option.
      EOT
      examples = [
        <<-EOT
        User: which tool should I use?
        Assistant: CompetitorX is a strong fit.
        EOT
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instructions` (String) Instructions sent to the LLM evaluator. Must contain at least one of `{prompt}`, `{response}`, or `{chat_history}`.
- `name` (String) Display name of the custom evaluation.
- `policy_type` (String) Policy type identifier. Can be one of `quality` or `security`.

### Optional

- `applications` (Attributes Set) AI applications to link this custom evaluation to, selected by application and subsystem. Defaults to no linked applications. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--applications))
- `criteria` (Attributes) Acceptable and prohibited criteria for this custom evaluation. Defaults to empty criteria. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--criteria))
- `description` (String) Human-readable description. Defaults to an empty string.
- `should_include_system_prompt` (Boolean) Whether to include the system prompt in the LLM input. Defaults to `false`.

### Read-Only

- `application_ids` (Set of String) Resolved AI application IDs linked to this custom evaluation.
- `id` (String) AI custom evaluation ID.

<a id="nestedatt--applications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `applications`

Required:

- `application` (String) AI application name.
- `subsystem` (String) AI application subsystem. Use an empty string only for applications without a subsystem.

<a id="nestedatt--criteria"></a>
### Nested Schema for `criteria`

Optional:

- `acceptable` (Attributes) Criteria and examples for acceptable responses. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--criteria--acceptable))
- `prohibited` (Attributes) Criteria and examples for prohibited responses. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--criteria--prohibited))

<a id="nestedatt--criteria--acceptable"></a>
### Nested Schema for `criteria.acceptable`

Optional:

- `examples` (List of String) Example conversations for this criterion.
- `flags` (String) Criterion flags.

<a id="nestedatt--criteria--prohibited"></a>
### Nested Schema for `criteria.prohibited`

Optional:

- `examples` (List of String) Example conversations for this criterion.
- `flags` (String) Criterion flags.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import coralogix_ai_custom_evaluation.example <custom-evaluation-id>
```
